word: H7835 - שָׁחַר - shâchar - shaw-khar' - Be black

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחר

Transliteration: shâchar

Phonetic: shaw-khar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be black
    1. (Qal) to be black (of skin)

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H7836 through the idea of the duskiness of early dawn]

TWOT entry: 2368

Part(s) of speech: Verb
